subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Almighty, the Self-Subsisting, and who hath answered unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن العزیز القیوم و اجاب الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @The Holy Spirit, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @chastisement and requital
